symbols: church vessels and treasures — the wealth of the Church distributed to the poor
child being bathed or tended — charity extended to the most vulnerable
elderly and infirm figures — the recipients of Christian mercy
Lawrence distributing goods — the deacon's vocation of service to those in need
description: A dark, dramatically lit scene showing several figures gathered around a table or basin. At center, an elderly bearded man reaches toward a child who appears to be in a basin of water. Ornate church vessels including a large decorative ewer are visible at left. An older woman holds what appears to be a cloth or garment at right. The scene is rendered in near-monochrome with strong chiaroscuro, the figures emerging from deep shadow. The overall tone suggests an act of care or charity being performed.
